title: SetHome plugin
description: Adds a SetHome command to minecraft
body:
**Set Home Plugin**
# 1. CORE Adds a new non-opperator needed command, wich allows you to set your home , and tp to it # 2. COMMANDS ```/home set```- To set your home
```/home tp``` - To tp to your set home. ( Cancels with the next command/ when moving even an inch with your camera )
```/home canceltp``` - To cancel the current tp request.
```/home reloadconfig``` - To reload the data from the plugins config.yml .
# 3. Miscellaneous The tp mechanic will stop even if you move you'r camera a bit.
You shouldn't worry about reload config, it doesnt do anything to a regular player.
